name: pr-babysitter
description: Standalone PR lifecycle care for repos you already contribute to: watches your open PRs, drafts substantive replies and rebases within hours of maintainer activity, and you approve every send. Exists because stale silence — not bad code — is how most external PRs die.

nodes.label: Monitor
nodes.promptContext: PR list comes from the stage target config. Sessions with nothing new should end quickly and cheaply — say 'no activity' and stop; the schedule brings you back.

checklist: Draft answers the actual question asked
Requested changes implemented and tested in the PR worktree
